purpose: Stores manual visual review decisions for incoming pilot source PNGs before copy promotion.
rules: Incoming metadata QA must pass before a manual visual review decision can promote a file.
Each decision must target one of the 10 pilot output IDs.
A visual_review_passed decision requires all required review fields to be true and no blocking notes.
This file is an input contract only; it must not copy, move, overwrite, or promote files.
